name: smidr
description: SmiðrUI — a lightweight retained-mode UI toolkit for OpenFL. Two dozen themable widgets (buttons, lists, menus, sliders, inputs, modals and more) that repaint only when invalidated, with built-in vector icons, pluggable fonts and localization, and an optional Flixel bridge.
releasenote: UIPanel is now theme-following by default (constructor takes a UISurface role; UIPanel.solid for fixed colours), so panels follow theme swaps like the rest of the library. Adds smidr.types.UISurface and a scrollable widget gallery. Breaking: the old UIPanel(w,h,fill:Int) and UIPanel.themed are removed.
